subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

output.reason: Deployment attempted at Tuesday 02:15 UTC, outside the approved Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC window, requiring CAB approval. Engineer seniority level also not verified against senior-engineer requirement.
